locator.quote: They never enter the breeding pool currently.

text: Garaged models are re-evaluated after all generations complete, not during breeding; they never enter the breeding pool currently.

locator.quote: the breeding pool could accelerate convergence by giving new

text: Mixing proven garaged models into the breeding pool could accelerate convergence by giving new generations access to optimised hyperparameters from previous runs.

locator.quote: Parent-only is probably better to start with.

text: Design choice: external parents either occupy survivor slots (competitive) or are parent-only (predictable, safer) — parent-only is probably better to start with.
